title: thymus lanceolatus
intro: Thymus lanceolatus, also known as creeping thyme or wild thyme, is a low-growing, spreading evergreen herb native to the Mediterranean region. It possesses antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its medicinal value. The health benefits of Thymus lanceolatus include relief from respiratory issues, such as coughs and bronchitis, as well as its potential to act as an antiseptic and antioxidant. Thymus lanceolatus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used for medicinal purposes.
